name: 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline
notes: Free, confidential support in the United States.

name: Línea 988 de Prevención del Suicidio y Crisis
contact: Llame o envíe un mensaje al 988, oprima 2 para español
notes: Apoyo gratuito y confidencial en español dentro de Estados Unidos.

name: Crisis Text Line
notes: Free crisis counseling via text message.

name: Catholic Charities USA
notes: Local Catholic Charities offices offer counseling and material assistance referrals.

name: Samaritans
notes: Confidential emotional support across the UK and Ireland.

name: Lifeline Australia
notes: Crisis support and suicide prevention across Australia.

name: International Association for Suicide Prevention
notes: Global directory of crisis centres by country.

name: Local emergency services
contact: Dial your country's emergency number (e.g. 911 in US/CA, 999 in UK/IE, 112 in EU, 000 in AU, 111 in NZ)
notes: Use local emergency services if you or someone you love is in immediate danger.

name: Speak with a trusted priest or pastoral minister
contact: Contact your parish or diocese; many offer same-day appointments in urgent situations.
notes: Pastoral support complements—but does not replace—medical and crisis professionals.
